title: Rich Dense British Tofu Toad In The Hole
description: A cultured, dense, post-workout British dish featuring tarragon-french flavors and dashi-extract, made jain-friendly and formed into a toad-in-the-hole shape. This recipe combines the richness of tofu and the savory flavors of British cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped tarragon and dashi extract mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the flour mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu to the skillet and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the tofu to a baking dish and top with the sage sausage mix.
Bake the toad-in-the-hole for 25 minutes, or until the sausage is cooked through and the tofu is crispy.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
